name: Holy Crusaders
effect: [Good] Increase assistants additively and multiplicatively based on spells cast this Era.
formula: Additive: (2 * x^0.5); Multiplicative: (2 * ln(1+x)^1.2)%; x = spells cast this Era

name: Heresiarchs
effect: [Evil] Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on combined activity time of Evil spells this Reincarnation.
formula: (30 + 0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = Evil spell activity time this Reincarnation

name: Trade Lords
effect: [Neutral] Increase Mana Regeneration and Faction Coin find chance based on time spent offline this Reincarnation.
formula: +(2.5 * x^0.75), where x = offline time this Reincarnation
